which is wrong for the gentlemen
to settle among themselves, not in
sinuating for single moment that
when thieves fall out honest men
get their dues.


But the old question of how much
reliance can be placed on a Wash
ington Water Power assurance is
still open to everybody but the
company and the city hall.


For instance, how does this
sound. also quoted from the Of
fetal spokesman OF June 26, two
days after the Howard street
bridge, too rotten to longer support
its own weight, fell into the river:


THE Washington Water Power
company has entered into a con-
tract to make Howard
street bridges absolutely safe and
convenient, not only for the opera
ton of the street cars, but for the
general publls as we'll. No portion
Of the expense is to be borne by
the city'-From letter of Presi-
dent Henry NJ. Richards Of the
Washington Water Power company
to the city council, October %.
1905, when he was fighting the ap-
plication Of the Spokane Traction
company for car franchise over
the Howard street bridges.


And there you are once more.
